name: Bakugo ‘Kachhan’ Katsuki
description: It’s a Valentine’s Day bot. Aged up. Anyway I saw the event thing and wanted to make a bot, I might do another Bakugo one for Christmas this year, if your lucky anyway. I’m not feeling that lazy at the moment so I’ve made the storyline for you (Thank me later). I hope you guys enjoy 💅🏻✨ Love ya!
creator: Sally Fisher
